title: get health check status
description: Test the GET /api/health endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status with the expected JSON body {status: 'ok', service: 'Creator Skill Backend'} when the service is healthy.

title: get root usage message
description: Test the GET / endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status with the JSON body {message: 'POST /api/generate-skill with creator content'} indicating usage instructions.

title: post generate skill from raw content valid
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill endpoint with valid pasted creator content (at least 40 characters) and optional parameters to verify it returns a 200 status with a GenerateSkillResponse containing skill files and metadata.

title: post generate skill from raw content validation error
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill endpoint with creator_content shorter than 40 characters to verify it returns a 422 validation error.

title: post generate skill from twitter valid
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill/twitter endpoint with a valid twitter_username (with or without leading '@') and optional parameters to verify it returns a 200 status with GenerateSkillResponse and source_metadata including twitter_username, tweet_count, and tweet_ids.

title: post generate skill from twitter missing bearer token
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill/twitter endpoint when the server is missing the X_BEARER_TOKEN configuration to verify it returns a 400 error with message 'X_BEARER_TOKEN not configured'.

title: post generate skill from twitter user not found
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill/twitter endpoint with a non-existent twitter_username to verify it returns a 502 error indicating an upstream X API error such as user not found or rate limit exceeded.

title: post generate skill from youtube valid
description: Test the POST /api/generate-skill/youtube endpoint with one or more valid YouTube URLs to verify it returns a 200 status with GenerateSkillResponse, source_metadata including video_count and video_ids, and warnings for any videos without captions.

title: get list generated skills
description: Test the GET /api/skills endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status with a list of generated skill packages including their names, flags for skill markdown and zip presence, and file entries with relative paths and content.

title: get export skill package zip
description: Test the GET /api/export/{skill_name}/zip endpoint to verify it returns a 200 status with a ZIP file download for an existing skill package, and a 404 error if the zip file is not found.
